docket_entries.description: ORDER APPROVING TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN GIVEN THE DISCLOSED DISCOUNT RATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING LLC'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown given the disclosed discount rate. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)
